name: Calendar Schedule Optimizer
description: Lists Google Calendar events for the current week, uses Claude AI to analyze the schedule and suggest optimizations including time-blocking, conflict resolution, and productivity improvements, then posts actionable recommendations to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Build an MCP server with Google Calendar and custom functions

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting schedule analysis

slackChannel.description: Slack channel to post schedule optimization

optimizationFocus.description: Optional focus area (e.g. 'reduce meetings', 'find focus time', 'balance workload')

steps.name: Calculate current and next week date range
Build Claude prompt for schedule optimization
Build Slack Block Kit schedule report
